description_long: This lamppost features a tall, faceted column with a geometric, almost crystalline design, tapering upward from a wide, multi-angled base. The base appears to be made of stone or concrete, providing stability and a solid foundation. The shaft is segmented into polygonal sections, giving it a modern, sculptural appearance. At the top, the lamp head is encased in a metallic or glass housing with vertical struts, resembling an Art Deco or modernist lantern. The color palette is primarily off-white and gray, with metallic accents at the lamp head. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban plazas, parks, or upscale streetscapes.
description: A tall, faceted lamppost with a polygonal column, wide stone base, and a modern lantern-style lamp head with metallic accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, multi-angled base and the full faceted column leading up to the lantern-style lamp head.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical segmentation of the shaft and the angular base, with the lamp head visible at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plaque or panel on the base and the symmetrical design of the column and lamp head.
description_view_3: Angled rear view emphasizing the geometric base and the consistent faceted pattern along the shaft.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern lantern-style head with vertical metallic struts and a faceted glass enclosure
